summary: Checked 41 claims, found 3 mirages (all minor). Every load-bearing factual claim is accurate: SQL columns (PG14 docs), selector/template machinery (query.go), View struct fields, diff/diffPair behavior, free hotkey 'o', filterViews test rows, image tag 0.0.9, and prepare-test-environment.sh lacking wal_level. The three minor findings are stale line-number citations and one off-by-one image tag (0.0.9->0.0.10 vs Dockerfile's two literal 0.0.9 sites).

findings.claim: Decision 2 / Risks cite diffPair behavior 'verified in internal/stat/postgres.go:316-343 / diffPair :445'.
findings.reality: Behavior is correct, but the cited line for the diff loop is slightly off: the diff() function spans lines 303-358, and the ukey-match + diff branch is at lines 321-343 (the comment block at 312-315, loop body 316-345). diffPair starts at line 444 (signature), not 445 (its first ParseInt path is at 455). The empty-string ParseInt-error claim is accurate: diffPair calls parsePairInt -> strconv.ParseInt which errors on "", and diff() returns that error (postgres.go:336-339).
findings.fix: Optionally adjust the citation to postgres.go:303-358 (diff) / :444 (diffPair). Non-blocking; the underlying behavior is verified correct.

findings.claim: Task 4 / Architecture: bump testing/Dockerfile label to 0.0.10 (singular 'label').
findings.reality: testing/Dockerfile contains TWO literal '0.0.9' occurrences that must change: LABEL version="0.0.9" (line 6) AND the CMD echo string 'pgcenter-testing 0.0.9: PostgreSQL 14-18 on Ubuntu 22.04' (line 38). The CMD line also already says '14-18' (not the 'stale 14-17 comment' the tech-spec claims must be fixed). Workflow refs (default.yml:9, release.yml:11) and the test-image tag 0.0.9 are confirmed present and correct.
findings.fix: In Task 4, note BOTH 0.0.9 sites in testing/Dockerfile (LABEL line 6 and CMD line 38). The 'stale 14-17 comment' to fix does not exist — the Dockerfile already reads '14-18'; drop or correct that sub-instruction.

findings.claim: Code-research §1.5 / Risks: Test_filterViews current wantN values include rows for versions 130000:4, 120000:7, 110000:9, 100000:9 and version 140000 with pgssSchema '' wantN 7.
findings.reality: record_test.go:116-121 confirms exactly these rows: {140000,"":7/16}, {140000,"public":1/22}, {130000:4/19}, {120000:7/16}, {110000:9/14}, {100000:9/14}. Claim is accurate. The tech-spec's '+1 per row on all six rows' (Task 3) is consistent with the 6 testcase rows present. No mirage — confirmed.
findings.fix: No change needed; recorded as a confirmed (not mirage) audit entry.

verified_claims: NO PostgresV15..PostgresV18 constants (const block ends at V14)
diff() matches rows by ukey, copies absolute cols outside [lo,hi] (postgres.go:303-358)
diffPair errors on empty string via ParseInt (postgres.go:444-459)
Hotkey 'o' is FREE (no 'o'/'O' binding in keybindings.go)
workflows reference lesovsky/pgcenter-testing:0.0.9 (default.yml:9, release.yml:11); prepare-test-environment.sh sets shared_preload_libraries only, NO wal_level
